notes: LANDING design pass (#496) promoted to the active seam at owner request 2026-06-21, pausing the Scout seam (#494) as the active one. Preserves every landing data-testid, the asserted copy, the section order, and the CTA href contract. The Scout seam (#494) is untouched and resumes when this lands; its runtime activation stays owner-gated (VOYAGE_API_KEY, SCOUT_*/ALLOW_PAID_LLM flags, CRON_SECRET, ENCRYPTION_KEY_LEGACY) -> BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT.
